messages.text: Hello! Welcome to the Grievance Registration System. I'm here to help you register your complaint today. May I know your full name please?

I'm here to help you today! May I please know your full name so I can assist you with your concern?

Once I have your name, I can help you register your issue. Thank you!

(And just to clarify, I'm here to help you register your complaint today, and I'll do my best to resolve it as soon as possible.
